description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, finished in a deep blue color. The front features a large, edge-to-edge glass touchscreen with a small notch at the top housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The back is a glossy blue surface with a prominent triple-lens camera array and flash in the upper left corner, slightly raised from the surface. The sides are thin and metallic, with no visible buttons or ports, contributing to a minimalist aesthetic. The device appears to be constructed primarily from glass and metal, with internal components likely including a battery, circuit boards, and other electronics. The overall design is typical of high-end smartphones, emphasizing both functionality and style.
description: A sleek, blue modern smartphone with a large glass touchscreen and a triple-lens camera array on the back. The device features a minimalist, buttonless design and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large glass touchscreen with a notch at the top displaying time, date, and weather icons.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the slim profile and absence of visible buttons or ports.
description_view_2: Back view highlighting the glossy blue surface and the triple-lens camera array with flash in the upper left corner.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the thin edge, also without visible buttons or ports.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a gradient wallpaper with the time '23.55', the day 'Friday', and a weather widget showing a cloud and crescent moon in the top right corner.
attribute_camera_placement: Three camera lenses and a flash are arranged in a triangular pattern within a raised square module at the top left corner on the back.
